properties.title: Global Farm Size, Version 1, 2000
properties.description: The Global Farm Size, Version 1, 2000 is a global 8.4 km x 8.4 km gridded data set of dominant farm sizes derived from national-level data on farm size distributions and subnational data on field size distributions. The data set shows the global distribution of different sized farms.
properties.purpose: To provide a global map of farm sizes for global assessment studies where results are typically aggregated at the regional or global level.
